CustomField.description: This checkbox is auto-checked by the system when the cash has been moved to a Payment on Account or applied to a different invoice utilizing the Unapply Cash button.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicates that the cash originally linked to this payment has been unapplied from the associated invoice. Instead, it has been transferred to a Payment on Account for the lessee or utilized for other outstanding receivables from the lessee
CustomField.label: Cash Unapplied?
